description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a prominent control panel and a large display screen. The side panels are adorned with vibrant, detailed artwork depicting various characters from the Capcom vs. SNK 2 fighting game, rendered in a comic book style with bold outlines and dynamic poses. The front of the cabinet showcases a marquee with the game's title, 'Capcom vs. SNK 2: Millionaire Fighting 2001,' in bright, eye-catching colors. The control panel is equipped for two players, each with a joystick and six colored buttons, arranged in a traditional arcade layout. The cabinet is primarily constructed from wood or MDF, with a black and orange color scheme accented by the colorful graphics. The back panel is plain and unadorned, emphasizing the functional, utilitarian aspect of the machine.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with vibrant Capcom vs. SNK 2 artwork, dual-player controls, and a large display screen. The cabinet features bold side graphics, a colorful marquee, and a black-and-orange color scheme.
description_view_0: Left side view showing detailed character artwork and the protruding control panel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the marquee, screen, dual-player control panel, and game title.
description_view_2: Right side view with additional character artwork and the angled control panel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain black panel with no artwork or controls.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, flat front with visible bezels, medium-to-large size typical of classic arcade cabinets.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two-player side-by-side layout, each with one joystick and six colored buttons, arranged in two rows, with a black panel and colored button scheme.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'Capcom vs. SNK 2' logo in bold, colorful text with a dynamic background, matching the game's fighting theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels are covered with vibrant, detailed character artwork from the Capcom vs. SNK 2 game, using a comic book style with multiple faces and dynamic poses in red, yellow, green, and beige tones.
